original_image_tags: A scanned, typewritten document page. The paper is aged and slightly yellowed with two hole-punch marks at the top center. The text is a single paragraph describing Incident 195. There are a few small, dark spots on the page, likely from age or scanning artifacts.

elements.description: Typed document titled 'Incident: 195' containing a paragraph of text. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present. There are two circular punch holes at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree there are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, only a typed document with punch holes, so they are factually consistent on the visual content.
